cases.source_or_scenario: <T as ParseFactory>::parse(text) with one statically selected conformance
assertions: the explicit Trait qualifier fixes the lookup domain
the selected associated function retains all seven canonical identity and responsibility axes
selection performs no runtime lookup, fallback, provider search, or activation

cases.source_or_scenario: <T as DefaultValue>::default selects one const-evaluable deeply immutable associated let::
assertions: the binding is immutable and const-evaluable or static-materializable
the value has no Resource, drop, authority, borrow-escape, mutable-state, or initialization-cycle residue
the selected value identity survives lowering

cases.source_or_scenario: <T as Factory>::Product::defaultValue first selects an associated type and then its nominal type-side member
assertions: the first selector is checked as an associated type
the second selector enters only the normalized nominal type-side domain
no Trait or extension fallback participates in the second selection

cases.source_or_scenario: a def:: factory declared lexically inside User invokes one private User constructor
assertions: User::fromValidated resolves only in the nominal type-side domain
the declaring owner grants its bounded private construction privilege
no conformance, extension, or companion authority is involved

cases.source_or_scenario: Logger::telemetry::logStartupMessage() selects one exact named type-side extension
assertions: the named extension selector fixes one extension domain
the extension creates no Trait witness and receives no owner-private privilege
import order cannot make another extension win

cases.source_or_scenario: an explicitly injected factory service value owns mutable runtime state and is called as an ordinary value
assertions: runtime identity and state belong to the explicit service value
the service is not a type token or conformance witness converted to a value
authority and failure remain visible in the ordinary value contract

cases.source_or_scenario: generic associated function selection is recorded in typed HIR and MIR without executing the selected function
assertions: all seven canonical static identity and responsibility axes are present before and after MIR lowering
evidence selection itself triggers no function or class activation
the fixture creates or closes no P1 and executes no product lane

cases.source_or_scenario: generic T::parse(text) attempts to select a ParseFactory associated function
assertions: T::item never searches the Trait associated-static domain
the required repair is the explicit <T as ParseFactory>::parse(text) surface
visibility of exactly one Trait does not create a shortcut

cases.source_or_scenario: T::default is visible as a nominal member, two Trait associated values, and one named extension item
assertions: candidate domains are not merged into one ranking list
source, import, or use order cannot select a winner
the author must select a nominal, named-extension, or explicit Trait-qualified surface

cases.source_or_scenario: <T as ParseFactory>::missing names no requirement declared by ParseFactory
assertions: the exact Trait domain contains no matching RequirementId
nominal and extension lookup are not fallback routes
no partial static identity is emitted

cases.source_or_scenario: <T as Factory>::Product() calls an associated type as a function
assertions: the RequirementId is found but has associated-type kind
a call suffix requires associated-function kind
constructor, nominal, or extension reinterpretation is forbidden

cases.source_or_scenario: an external conformance def:: implementation invokes a private constructor of its target type
assertions: conformance evidence does not grant lexical owner privilege
the implementation may call only ordinarily visible construction routes
the conformance method does not become a nominal Type::member

cases.source_or_scenario: associated let:: binds a mutable registry, Resource, ambient authority, escaping borrow, cyclic initializer, or runtime cache
assertions: the initial Stable associated-value profile is const-evaluable or static-materializable
mutable state and lifecycle responsibility require an explicit runtime owner
no invalid value enters the published associated-static domain

cases.source_or_scenario: companion object declaration or assignment of a type name or conformance witness to an ordinary factory value
assertions: Deeplus has no companion keyword or implicit singleton object
type tokens and witnesses do not convert to storable runtime values
the repair is an explicit nominal service, Actor, shared-state owner, or context value

cases.source_or_scenario: the shared textual selector <T as Trait>::item occurs once in type context and once in expression context
assertions: type context admits only an associated type requirement
expression context admits only associated value or function requirements
the parser context does not erase the selected requirement kind

cases.source_or_scenario: Type::default and <Type as DefaultValue>::default both exist with the same item spelling
assertions: Type::default selects only the nominal type-side item
<Type as DefaultValue>::default selects only the Trait associated value
neither surface shadows or ranks the other

cases.source_or_scenario: TraitA and TraitB both declare parse, and source explicitly selects <T as TraitB>::parse
assertions: the TraitB qualifier fixes one RequirementId and one witness
TraitA visibility does not create a competing candidate
source and import permutations leave the selected identity unchanged

cases.source_or_scenario: one coherent default conformance and one named alternate exist; only an explicitly bound evidence channel may select the alternate
assertions: the named alternate never enters automatic candidate collection
explicit evidence preserves one exact ConformanceId and TraitWitnessId
the witness is not converted into a runtime companion value

cases.source_or_scenario: class-body scope#static is shown only as a nonactivatable Preview candidate while public static class Cache remains rejected
assertions: current class scope#static AST, HIR, MIR, and acceptance counts are zero
the removed static class spelling remains rejected
the Preview description closes no P1 and executes no product lane

cases.source_or_scenario: a nominal def:: with Stable function scope#static is selected while class scope#static remains absent
assertions: FunctionStaticOwnerId remains the callable activation identity
selection alone triggers no activation and creates no type-static owner
actual invocation uses the existing ownership_commit and invents no CALL_INPUT_COMMIT event

cases.source_or_scenario: a const-evaluable immutable descriptor is accepted, while an otherwise immutable value requiring an unspecified runtime cache lifecycle is rejected
assertions: the accepted side is const-evaluable or static-materializable
runtime caching does not become implicit associated-static state
the rejected side moves to an explicit service or a future separately ratified lifecycle

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant merges nominal, named-extension, Trait-associated, and runtime-value candidates into one lookup list
assertions: the canonical model retains exactly four disjoint domains
no cross-domain candidate ranking or fallback is admitted
the merged-domain mutant is detected before lowering

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant chooses an unqualified associated item by source, import, use, or link order
assertions: the canonical source requires <T as Trait>::item
permuting declarations or imports never changes the selected identity
order is absent from the candidate key and every digest

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant drops TraitId, RequirementId, ConformanceId, TraitWitnessId, ImplementationId, SubstitutionId, or ResponsibilityId from HIR, MIR, or API residue
assertions: all seven canonical axes are mandatory and independently checked
selected identity is never reconstructed from source spelling at runtime
the incomplete-residue mutant is rejected before linking

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant erases the selected static identity and performs runtime witness lookup, provider search, fallback, or activation
assertions: runtime lookup, provider search, and fallback counts remain zero
static evidence selection does not activate any callable or class owner
MIR consumes the exact selected identity without reconstruction

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant grants owner-private constructor access to an external conformance or named type-side extension
assertions: only a lexically owner-local nominal def:: receives the bounded privilege
same module or package does not manufacture owner-local authority
external code remains subject to ordinary visibility

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant admits a non-const runtime cache, mutable value, Resource, ambient authority, escaping borrow, or cyclic initializer as associated let::
assertions: invalid associated value admission count remains zero
stateful or lifecycle-bearing values require an explicit runtime owner
the associated value profile remains immutable, acyclic, and safely publishable

cases.source_or_scenario: mutant activates class scope#static as current, reuses FunctionStaticOwnerId as a type cache, or inserts CALL_INPUT_COMMIT
assertions: class scope#static current acceptance and activation counts remain zero
FunctionStaticOwnerId never becomes a type field cache or class-wide barrier
the only existing call-boundary event remains ownership_commit and no product lane executes
